title: Please Touch Grass
description: A reminder every 60 seconds to touch grass.
body:
This pack uses [regional compliancies](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Resource_pack#Regional_compliancies_warnings) to remind the player they need to touch grass every 60 seconds, in a completely vanilla resource pack that doesn't require mods. The counter ticks up as well, so you can keep track of exactly how long it's been since you've touched grass.

![The Please Touch Grass toast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/760af3a375813c3af121a33654805f2eb1bc70bd.png)
